name: Icewind Dale
summary: A frozen northern frontier of isolated towns, brutal weather, old dwarven holds, Reghed tribes and long shadows beneath the Spine of the World.
politics: Icewind Dale is shaped by local powers, trade needs and old conflicts.
Adventurers can shift local balances quickly if they earn trust or fear.
culture: People of Icewind Dale carry strong local customs and stories.
Rumour, reputation and practical help matter to most communities.
rumours: Something old has stirred somewhere in Icewind Dale.
A recent disappearance has locals worried.
A merchant is paying quietly for reliable blades.
dmSecrets: A hidden faction is exploiting unrest in Icewind Dale.
An old site nearby is connected to a larger campaign mystery.
